display.purpose: Hero H1 only; balanced line breaks.

headline.purpose: Section H2 with sea-glass marker bar.

shadows.name: shadow-card-hover
shadows.purpose: Project card hover on pointer devices only.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default transition easing for color, border, shadow, transform.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA; one per hero, full-width on narrow viewports.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.4rem; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 999px; border: 2px solid transparent; background: oklch(48% 0.06 210); color: oklch(97% 0.02 210); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px oklch(38% 0.06 210 / 0.22); transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(38% 0.055 210); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px oklch(38% 0.06 210 / 0.22); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.06 55); outline-offset: 2px; background: oklch(38% 0.055 210); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary actions; surface fill with clay hover accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.4rem; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 999px; border: 2px solid oklch(88% 0.015 80); background: oklch(99.5% 0.006 85); color: oklch(28% 0.02 240); transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: oklch(62% 0.06 55); color: oklch(48% 0.055 55); background: color-mix(in srgb, oklch(62% 0.06 55) 8%, oklch(99.5% 0.006 85)); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.06 55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Header Nav Link
components.description: Pill nav item in sticky header and footer.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.5em 1em; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(48% 0.025 220); border-radius: 999px; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { color: oklch(28% 0.02 240); background: oklch(95.5% 0.012 80); outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.06 55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Linked project tile in the directory grid.
components.html:
Timesheeter ↗

A lightweight tool for tracking time.

ProductProductivity
components.css: .ds-project-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; height: 100%; min-width: 0; padding: 1.5rem; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(28% 0.02 240); background: oklch(99.5% 0.006 85); border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.015 80); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(28% 0.02 240 / 0.06); transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, oklch(48% 0.06 210) 35%, oklch(88% 0.015 80)); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px oklch(38% 0.06 210 / 0.22); } .ds-project-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.06 55); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-project-card__title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0; } .ds-project-card__desc { font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.65; color: oklch(48% 0.025 220); margin: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-project-card__meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: auto; padding-top: 0.75rem; } .ds-badge { font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.25em 0.65em; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(94% 0.03 210); color: oklch(38% 0.055 210); } .ds-tag { font-size: 0.8125rem; color: oklch(48% 0.025 220); }

components.name: Section Title
components.description: H2 with sea-glass marker bar above.
components.css: .ds-section-title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.375rem, 2.5vw, 1.75rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: -0.03em; margin: 0 0 1.5rem; color: oklch(28% 0.02 240); } .ds-section-title::before { content: ''; display: block; width: 2.25rem; height: 3px; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(48% 0.06 210); margin-bottom: 1rem; }

components.name: Value List Item
components.description: Principles list row; not a card.
components.html:
• Practical over theatrical

    Useful software and clear execution over hype.
components.css: .ds-value-item { padding-bottom: 1.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.015 80); list-style: none; } .ds-value-title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; color: oklch(28% 0.02 240); } .ds-value-desc { margin: 0; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.65; color: oklch(48% 0.025 220); max-width: 58ch; }

narrative.overview: A founder or collaborator scanning project links at midday on a bright desk. The UI reads like a well-kept index on a workbench: warm linen paper, sea-glass teal for wayfinding, dusty clay for secondary warmth. Motion is restrained; project cards are the only card grid; principles use a flat list.
keyCharacteristics: Single-page index: hero, about, principles list, project directory, contact
OKLCH tokens in CSS; hex in frontmatter for Stitch export
Tally embed with dynamicHeight; no iframe scrollbar

rules.name: The OKLCH Source Rule
rules.body: All new color decisions are authored in OKLCH in CSS. Hex in DESIGN.md is for export compatibility only.

rules.name: The Two-Accent Rule
rules.body: Sea-glass and clay are the only accent hues.

rules.name: The No Pure Black Rule
rules.body: Never use #000 or #fff. Tint neutrals toward warm linen or sea-glass.

rules.name: The 1.25 Scale Rule
rules.body: Type steps use a 1.25 ratio from caption through display.

rules.name: The One H1 Rule
rules.body: Exactly one H1 per page. Section titles are H2.

rules.name: The No Glass Rule
rules.body: No decorative backdrop-filter stacks. Header is solid surface.

dos: Do author colors in OKLCH in global.css and keep neutrals warm-tinted.
Do use sea-glass for primary wayfinding and clay for focus/secondary warmth only.
Do keep copy plain and scannable; one H1; no em dashes in UI copy.
Do open external projects in a new tab with rel="noopener noreferrer" and an accessible new-window cue.
Do use scroll-margin-top under the sticky header for in-page anchors.
Do validate Tally and project URLs at build time.
donts: Don't use gradient text on headlines or the logo.
Don't build toward a VC-backed SaaS homepage: purple gradients, hero metrics, interchangeable product UI marketing.
Don't mimic a fake agency or corporate site: invented scale, stock authority.
Don't ship AI hype page aesthetics: glass cards, template icon+title+blurb grids on every section.
Don't use side-stripe borders on cards or lists.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing.
Don't add decorative hero blobs or page-wide radial gradients without explicit purpose.
